title: AS/NZS 1576:2019 Scaffold Member Design
description: Design scaffolding members as per AS/NZS 1576.1:2019 & AS/NZS 1576.2:2016.

d.description: do. Units: mm. Outer Diameter for CHS.

t_w.description: t. Symbol: t. Units: mm. Wall Thickness of CHS.

grade.description: Grade. Symbol: Grade. CHS Grade. See AS 4100 Table 2.1.

f_y.description: fy. Symbol: f_{y}. Units: MPa. Yield Strength of Member (fy). See AS 4100 Table 2.1.

f_u.description: fu. Symbol: f_{u}. Units: MPa. Ultimate Strength of Member (fu). See AS 4100 Table 2.1.

k_e.description: ke. Symbol: k_{e}. Effective Length Factor for Buckling in Compression. For triangulated structure should not be less than 1 (AS 4100 4.6.3.5). Refer AS 4100 Figure 4.6.3.2 for ke.

M.description: M*. Symbol: M^*. Units: kN-m. Design Bending Force in Member.

V.description: V*. Symbol: V^*. Units: kN. Design Shear Force in Member.

F_t.description: F*t. Symbol: F^*_{t}. Units: kN. Design Tension Force in Member.

F_c.description: F*c. Symbol: F^*_{c}. Units: kN. Design Compression Force in Member.

c_t.description: Coupler Type. Symbol: Coupler. Type of coupler at connection end. Strength based on AS 1576.2 requirements with a factor of safety of 2 considered for the working load limit (WLL) for all connections. If custom is selected then manufacturer WLLs can be specified. Select none to skip coupler checks.

cc_b.description: Bending Capacity. Symbol: C_{cb}. Units: kN-m. Bending Capacity as a Working Load Limit (See AS 1576.2 or manufacturer specs).

cc_s.description: Shear Capacity. Symbol: C_{cs}. Units: kN. Shear Capacity as a Working Load Limit (See AS 1576.2 or manufacturer specs).

cc_t.description: Tension Resistance. Symbol: C_{ct}. Units: kN. Tension/Slip Capacity as a Working Load Limit (See AS 1576.2 or manufacturer specs).

cc_c.description: Compression Resistance. Symbol: C_{cc}. Units: kN. Compression/Slip Capacity as a Working Load Limit (See AS 1576.2 or manufacturer specs).

M_e.description: Me. Symbol: M_{e}. Units: kN-m. Max Working Bending Force in Coupler at Member End.

V_e.description: Ve. Symbol: V_{e}. Units: kN. Max Working Shear Force in Coupler at Member End.

F_te.description: Fte. Symbol: F_{te}. Units: kN. Max Working Tension Force in Coupler at Member End.

F_ce.description: Fce. Symbol: F_{ce}. Units: kN. Max Working Compression Force in Coupler at Member End.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
